name: veloceai-whatsapp-saas
description: Enterprise AI WhatsApp Sales & Marketing Automation Platform Monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,violet" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start:prod: npx concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,violet" "npm run start:prod --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
